question: Find the first name and age of students who have a pet.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.fname ,  T1.age FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid
gold_sql_original: SELECT DISTINCT T1.fname ,  T1.age FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid

agent_sql: SELECT Fname AS first_name, Age AS age FROM student JOIN has_pet ON student.StuID = has_pet.StuID LIMIT 100
safe_sql: SELECT Fname AS first_name, Age AS age FROM student JOIN has_pet ON student.StuID = has_pet.StuID LIMIT 100
